questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

options.label: Charles is asking Lucy where he should leave her backpack.
Charles is checking if Lucy has lost her backpack.
Charles is letting Lucy know where her backpack is.

questions.explanation: Charles đang cho Lucy biết ba lô của cô ấy đang để ở đâu (tại quầy tiếp tân).

options.label: You have to go to the castle to book the walking tour.
You should send an email to find out when the next walking tour is.
You need to contact the guide before you can go on the walking tour.

questions.explanation: Thông báo yêu cầu gửi email cho guide để đặt chỗ miễn phí cho tour.

options.label: they'll pay less to see the film at 5.30 p.m.
they need to book cinema tickets by 3 p.m.
it's not possible for them to see the film at 8 p.m.

questions.explanation: Có giảm giá trước 6 p.m., và suất 5:30 p.m. nằm trong khung giờ đó nên rẻ hơn.

questions.prompt: Why did Andy write this text?

options.label: to suggest meeting Steve at a different restaurant
to explain to Steve that he will be late
to tell Steve why he can't meet him

questions.explanation: Andy giải thích rằng anh ấy sẽ đến nhà hàng sau 7:30 nên sẽ muộn.

options.label: asking Henry if she can bring an extra person to the restaurant tonight
telling Henry about the restaurant she has chosen for tonight
checking who is going to be at the restaurant tonight

questions.explanation: Suzy hỏi Henry liệu có ổn khi để Ella (người thêm) tham gia cùng không.

options.label: will have to see a different dentist.
won't see their dentist that day.
must wait until a dentist is free to see them.

questions.explanation: Nếu bỏ lỡ lịch hẹn, bạn sẽ cần đặt lịch mới cho ngày khác, nghĩa là không gặp nha sĩ hôm đó.

passage.label: Angus
passage.text: My university has an internet group for new students, which I joined before I went. One person on there said that on her sister's first day, she brought sweets from home to offer to everyone she met, as a way to start a conversation. I thought that was a good idea, so I did the same. It worked, but in fact, the really good friends I have now are all people I met a few weeks later.

passage.label: Frank
passage.text: I live at my university, and Mum and Dad drove me here on my first day. After they left, I felt terrible. I sat alone looking at photos of friends from home. But later, I went to a talk about all the university clubs, and I really enjoyed it. Clubs are a great way to meet people, and if you're going to university, you should join some. They helped me a lot. Before I came to university, I was a quiet person, but these days I can talk to people more easily.

passage.label: Zac
passage.text: I was away on holiday with my parents for the first week of my university course, so I missed all of the activities where people make friends. On that first morning, I couldn't get online, so I went looking for someone who knew what to do. The student I found got my wi-fi working and is now my best friend. I've also met lots of people because of him. Mum and Dad say I've grown up since I started university, but I'm not sure.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Who needed help with the internet on his first day?
questions.explanation: Zac không thể kết nối internet sáng đầu tiên, phải nhờ một sinh viên khác giúp (và người đó giờ là bạn thân).

questions.prompt: Who felt sad when his parents went home?
questions.explanation: Frank cảm thấy terrible sau khi bố mẹ rời đi, ngồi một mình nhìn ảnh bạn bè.

questions.prompt: Who took something to university to help him make friends?
questions.explanation: Angus mang kẹo từ nhà đến để tặng mọi người gặp gỡ như cách bắt chuyện (lấy ý từ người khác trên group).

questions.prompt: Who started university later than other students?
questions.explanation: Zac đi nghỉ với bố mẹ tuần đầu tiên của khóa học, bỏ lỡ các hoạt động làm quen.

questions.prompt: Who is still friends with someone he met on his first day at university?
questions.explanation: Zac kết bạn với sinh viên đã giúp wi-fi, và người đó giờ là best friend.

questions.prompt: Who thinks he has changed since he started university?
questions.explanation: Frank trước đây là người ít nói, nhưng giờ có thể nói chuyện với người khác dễ dàng hơn nhiều.

questions.prompt: Who met other new students online before starting university?
questions.explanation: Angus đã tham gia internet group cho sinh viên mới trước khi đến trường.

passage.text: Tom Morgan flew 25 kilometres across South Africa using only 100 party balloons.

Tom Morgan is a British man who started a club planning adventures for people. His idea is to give people some danger in their lives, as he thinks we don’t have enough of that these days. The adventures he plans include races across various countries using unusual types of transport.

Last year Tom went to Africa for a crazy adventure with some friends. The plan was to tie 100 party balloons to a chair Tom was sitting in, and make it fly into the air. Tom’s not the first person to do this. Jonathan Trappe from the USA has done it, but it was an article in an adventure magazine that made Tom want to try it.

Tom chose the country of Botswana for his adventure because it has lots of empty space and isn’t near the sea. However, the weather was so windy there that they lost lots of balloons, so they went to South Africa instead. This time, the flight was a great success.
Tom says the views from 2,400 metres up were amazing, and remembers how quiet it was. However, he spent most of the time worrying about what to do if he flew too high and how to get back down.

One reason Tom did his balloon flight was to check if it’s possible to fly using party balloons. Now he knows it is, he’s planning the first party balloon air race in Africa. He hopes lots of his club members will enter.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.prompt: Why did Tom start his adventure club?

options.label: He thinks everyone should travel more.
He believes that modern life is too safe.
He wants to meet people who like adventures.

questions.explanation: Tom nghĩ mọi người thiếu 'danger' trong cuộc sống hiện đại, nên lập club để tạo adventure.

questions.prompt: Tom got the idea for flying with balloons from
questions.explanation: Một bài báo trong adventure magazine đã khiến Tom muốn thử bay bằng bóng bay.

questions.prompt: Tom wasn’t able to fly in Botswana because

options.label: he wanted to be nearer to the sea.

questions.explanation: Thời tiết ở Botswana quá gió, làm mất nhiều bóng bay, nên chuyển sang Nam Phi.

questions.prompt: How did Tom feel during the flight?

options.label: pleased that there was no noise

questions.explanation: Ông ấy dành phần lớn thời gian lo lắng về việc bay quá cao và làm sao để hạ cánh.

questions.prompt: What is Tom working on at the moment?

options.label: starting a new type of balloon race

questions.explanation: Ông ấy đang lập kế hoạch cho cuộc đua bóng bay party đầu tiên ở châu Phi.

parts.passageTitle: Part 4 — The coldest place to live

passage.text: Oymyakon is a village in a part of Russia called Yakutia. During the winter, the days are (19) ........, and temperatures can go as (20) ........ as -68°C. There are colder places in the world, such as Antarctica, but people only (21) ........ there for a few weeks. Oymyakon is the coldest place where people live all the time.

A lot of things don't work normally in Oymyakon because it's so cold. For example, if a car is (22) ........ outside, the engine will not start again, so people keep cars in heated garages. It is also very difficult to (23) ........ plants for food when it is so cold, so people in Oymyakon mostly eat meat. In some countries, schools close when it's very cold, but that only (24) ........ in Oymyakon if it's colder than -52°C.

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.explanation: Vì mùa đông ở đây ngày ngắn (short).
Nhiệt độ có thể thấp (low) tới -68°C.
Chỉ có người ở (stay) vài tuần ở Nam Cực, không sống lâu dài.
Nếu xe bị bỏ (left) ngoài trời, động cơ không khởi động lại được.
Rất khó trồng (grow) cây lương thực khi trời quá lạnh.
Chỉ xảy ra (happens) nếu lạnh hơn -52°C.

passage.text:
From: Sylvia
To: Felix

I’m so glad we (0) are doing our history project together! (25) ........ you think the college library will have some useful books about local history? (26) ........ don’t we meet there tomorrow? Remember we’ve only got three weeks before we have (27) ........ give the project to the teacher.

From: Felix
To: Sylvia

Don’t worry! (28) ........ we work really hard, then our project will be brilliant! Yes, let’s meet at the college library. I’m sure we’ll find lots (29) ........ interesting books there. I’m afraid I’m busy tomorrow, (30) ........ I’m free on Friday. Can you meet me then?

questionGroups.instruction: For each question, write the correct answer. Write ONE word for each gap.

questions.explanation: Do you think ... ? (câu hỏi Yes/No)
Why don’t we meet ... ? (đề xuất gặp gỡ)
have to give the project
If we work really hard, then ... (câu điều kiện loại 1)
lots of interesting books
but I’m free on Friday (tương phản với busy tomorrow)
